primary_claim: CLAF++ + Symbolic improves AUROC by 2.09 percentage points over AE only and reduces false alarm rate by 5.86 points.
meta_claim: The meta-learner improves AUROC by 0.25 percentage points over soft ensemble fusion, showing that learned stacking is the primary contributor.
symbolic_claim: The symbolic enhancement changes AUROC by 0.00 points and false alarm rate by 0.00 points relative to the neural meta model.
